hero.name: Sumaiya Khan
hero.bio: Undergraduate researcher at KUET specializing in NLP, machine learning, and bioinformatics. Passionate about building technology that solves real problems.

paragraphs: I'm a final-year Computer Science & Engineering undergraduate at Khulna University of Engineering & Technology (KUET), expected to graduate in 2026. My academic journey has been driven by a deep curiosity about how machines understand and generate language.
My thesis explores Mixture of Experts (MoE) architectures for Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) in Bangla, integrating optimization techniques to improve model efficiency on low-resource languages.
Beyond research, I build full-stack applications — from a Laravel-based job portal to a deep-learning powered plant disease detector with a React Native frontend.
I received the Dean's Award in my 3rd year for academic excellence, and I'm currently exploring bioinformatics, particularly network-based analysis for autoimmune disease target discovery.

thesis.title: Mixture of Experts for Grammatical Error Correction in Bangla with Optimization Techniques
thesis.desc: Investigating MoE-based transformer architectures for low-resource Bangla NLP, with a focus on grammatical error correction. Applies optimization techniques to balance model capacity and computational efficiency on a Bangla GEC dataset.

publications.title: Accelerating Bangla NLP Tasks with Automatic Mixed Precision: Resource-Efficient Training Preserving Model Efficacy
publications.authors: Mehrab Hossain Opi, Sumaiya Khan, et al.
publications.venue: 28th International Conference on Computer and Information Technology (ICCIT 2025)

publications.title: Study of Two Temperatures on Lab-scale Synthesis and Characterization of Hexagonal Boron Nitride
publications.authors: Sifat Kawsar, Abrar Rafid Siddique, Abdullah-Al-Noman, Sayem Kawsar, Sumaiya Khan

publications.title: Polymer Nanocomposites with Hybrid Nanoparticles - A Review
publications.authors: Sumaiya Khan (AI/ML Section), Tasnim Alam Subah, Hasan Tasnim Salehin, et al.

publications.title: Introduction to Wood Science and Technology: Structure, Chemistry, Innovations in Wood Formulations, Processing and Engineering
publications.authors: Sumaiya Khan, Hasan Tasnim Salehin, Md. Fozle Rabbi, et al.

projects.title: Job Search System
projects.desc: Full-featured job portal enabling employers to post vacancies and candidates to search, apply, and track applications. Built with Laravel MVC, role-based access control, and search/filter functionality.

projects.title: Plant Disease Detection
projects.desc: Mobile application for real-time plant disease detection from images using a trained CNN model. React Native frontend, Node.js REST API backend, MongoDB for data management.

projects.title: Bookstore Android App
projects.desc: Android bookstore application with browse, search, cart, and purchase flow. Applied Observer, Adapter, and MVC design patterns for clean, maintainable architecture.

projects.title: SLE Therapeutic Target Discovery
projects.desc: Exploratory research project applying integrative transcriptomic and network-based analysis to identify therapeutic targets in Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.

projects.title: JavaScript Tutorial Blog
projects.desc: Comprehensive JavaScript tutorial covering Variables, Operators, Data Types, Functions, Loops, Objects, and Error Handling. Written as a club contribution to Bit2Byte at KUET.

extracurriculars.title: Senior Mentor for Girls
extracurriculars.desc: Mentored junior female students in software development and research skills, fostering an inclusive technical community at KUET.

extracurriculars.title: Junior Executive Member
extracurriculars.desc: Contributed to organizing one of KUET's flagship technical festivals, coordinating events and managing volunteer teams.

extracurriculars.title: Technical Content Writer
extracurriculars.desc: Authored a comprehensive JavaScript tutorial blog for the club covering core concepts.

extracurriculars.title: Dean's Award
extracurriculars.desc: Awarded the Dean's Award for outstanding academic performance during the 3rd year of the B.Sc. program at KUET.
